rule_sets.name: QS Gate Rules
rule_sets.description: Data-driven QS pedestrian gate BOM rules v1

rule_versions.notes: Initial QS gate rules — screw-fixed 65mm blades, HD rail, QSG side frames

product_constraints.name: slat_size_enum
product_constraints.message: QS gate supports 65mm slat size only

product_validations.name: gate_width_in_range
product_validations.message: Gate width must be between 400mm and 1200mm

product_validations.name: gate_height_in_range
product_validations.message: Gate height must be between 600mm and 2100mm

product_validations.name: lock_box_type_required_if_enabled
product_validations.message: A lock box type must be selected when lock box is enabled

product_rules.name: gate_blade_cut_mm
product_rules.notes: Gate blade cut = gate_width - 86mm

product_rules.name: rail65_cut_mm
product_rules.notes: 65mm QSG top/bottom rail cut = gate_width - 80mm

product_rules.name: gsf_cut_mm
product_rules.notes: Gate side frame (GSF) cut = gate_height - 3mm

product_rules.name: num_gate_blades
product_rules.notes: Gate blade count: 133mm top+bottom rail allowance (vs 3mm lip in fence). Reverse formula from fence with 133mm deduction instead of 3mm.

product_rules.name: blades_per_stock_length
product_rules.notes: How many blade cuts from one 6100mm stock length

product_rules.name: blade_stock_lengths_needed
product_rules.notes: Stock lengths of gate blade needed

product_rules.name: rails_per_stock_length
product_rules.notes: How many 65mm QSG rail cuts from one 4800mm stock length

product_rules.name: rail_stock_lengths_needed
product_rules.notes: 2 65mm QSG rails needed per gate (top + bottom)

product_rules.name: rail_screw_packs_needed
product_rules.notes: Rail screws for 65mm QSG top + bottom rails, sold in 50-packs

product_rules.name: slat_spacer_packs_needed
product_rules.notes: Slat spacers for pedestrian gate slats, sold in 50-packs

product_rules.name: wafer_screw_packs_needed
product_rules.notes: Wafer screws for pedestrian gate slats, sold in 50-packs

product_rules.name: gsf_screw_count_per_frame
product_rules.notes: F-section screws per GSF: MAX(3, ROUNDUP((gsf_cut - 40)/600, 0) + 1)

product_rules.name: gsf_total_screws
product_rules.notes: 2 GSF per gate × 2 sides each = total GSF screws

product_rules.name: emit_gate_blades
product_rules.notes: Emit gate blade stock lengths (resolved via gate_blade_65_selector)

product_rules.name: emit_rail65
product_rules.notes: Emit 65mm QSG rail stock lengths — 1 per gate typically (2 cuts per 4800mm stock)

product_rules.name: emit_gate_stop
product_rules.notes: 3 gate stops per gate: 2 latch side + 1 hinge side (4200mm stock each)

product_rules.name: emit_hinge_latch_combo
product_rules.notes: 1 hinge/latch unit per gate — SKU resolved via hinge_type variable

product_rules.name: emit_lock_box
product_rules.notes: 1 lock box if include_lock_box is true — SKU resolved via lock_box_selector

product_rules.name: emit_gate_side_frames
product_rules.notes: 2 QSG gate side frames per gate — GSF pricing TBD

product_rules.name: emit_gate_infill
product_rules.notes: QSG gate infill for top and bottom 65mm rail runs

product_rules.name: emit_joiner_blocks
product_rules.notes: 1 pack of joiner blocks per gate — size matches slat_size_mm (only 65 currently)

product_rules.name: emit_screw_covers
product_rules.notes: 1 screw cover length per gate

product_rules.name: emit_frame_top_caps
product_rules.notes: 4 gate frame top caps per gate (2 per GSF × 2 GSF)

product_component_selectors.notes: Gate blade 65mm — colour resolved at runtime
65mm QSG top/bottom rail — colour resolved at runtime
Gate stop — standard colours fallback (checked after P/PB at priority 10)
Hinge/latch unit — resolved via hinge_type variable map
Lockwood Deadlatch lock box — colour resolved at runtime
Lever/Knob Lock Set lock box — colour resolved at runtime
QSG 50x50 gate side frame — colour resolved at runtime.
QSG gate infill for 65mm rails — colour resolved at runtime.
5mm slat spacer pack for gate slats
9mm slat spacer pack for gate slats
20mm slat spacer pack for gate slats
Gate screw cover length — colour resolved at runtime.
Gate frame top cap 50x50 — colour resolved at runtime.
Gate frame top cap 50mm — 4 per gate. Pricing TBD. Inactive: legacy placeholder replaced by QSG-GFC-50X50-{colour}.

product_companion_rules.notes: Any gate → add 1x hinge/latch combo (user-selected type)
QS gate → add 2x QSG 50x50 gate side frames
Selector emits QSG infill; kept inactive to avoid duplicate companion lines.
QS gate → add 1x joiner block 4-pack (65mm — matching slat_size_mm)
Selectors emit gap-specific spacer packs; kept inactive to avoid unresolved gap placeholders.
Selector emits wafer screw packs; kept inactive to avoid duplicate companion lines.
QS gate → add 1x gate screw cover length
QS gate → add rail screw 50-packs for the 65mm rails
QS gate → add 1x 50x50 gate frame top cap

product_warnings.message: Gate width is close to the 1200mm maximum. Verify structural adequacy.
QSG gate extrusions, joiner blocks, screw covers, rail screws and frame top caps need final price verification. Quote may be incomplete until pricing is loaded.
XP gate frame systems are discontinued. This gate uses QSG-4200-GSF50 side frames and QSG-4800-RAIL65/90 horizontal gate rails.
